Gastronomy and Culinary Arts

MENU

Our department is part of the Faculty of Applied Sciences of Okan University. The department conducts two programs . One where the teaching is conducted in Turkish and the other where 30% of the programme is conducted in English. Learning a foreign language, and being equipped with management and accounting skills is a must. Those wishing to learn more about us can visit the other pages made availabe on the web. Wishing you all the very best.
